message:
feat(import): resolve intra-file dependencies by title or stand-in ID (#244)

Markdown imports can now express dependencies between issues in the same
file without knowing generated IDs upfront. Two resolution mechanisms:

- Stand-in IDs: assign `### ID` to an issue, reference it from other
  issues' `### Dependencies` section (e.g., `db-1`)
- Title-based: use bulleted deps (`- Build Database Schema`) to
  reference issues by their exact H2 title

Both forward and backward references work — dependencies are resolved
in a second pass after all issues are created. Resolution order:
stand-in ID → title (case-insensitive) → storage ID (existing behavior).

Closes #244

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
